title: what's the possible reason for the hang at time 0 in cosim mode?
body:
I compile the design sip into library with protect-lib mode. use VCS to compile TB.
It can run but the result is wrong.
So I compile the design with --trace and defined one function sc_time_stamp to return sim time with VPI.

but at runtime, vcs hangs at time 0. with -loop_report, we found the recursive call is in generated library.

```
->Vsip::_initial__TOP_1
->Vsip::_eval_initial
->Vsip::_eval_initial_loop
->Vsip::_eval_step()
-> sip_protectlib_comb_update()
-> Vsip::_eval_settle
->_Vsip::_eval_initial_loop 
-> Vsip::eval_step() 
-> sip_protectlib_combo_update 
-> Vsip::__Vdpiimwrap_sip__DOT_sip_protectlib_combo_pdate_TOP 
-> Vsip::_combo__TOP__3 
-> Vsip::_eval_settle
-> Vsip::_eval_initial_loop
-> Vsip::eval_step() 
-> sip_protectlib_comb_update()
-> ...
```

Do you have any suspect on this issue? as DIDNOTCONVERGE error is not reported, I don't have the clue to check.
code_blocks:
->Vsip::_initial__TOP_1
->Vsip::_eval_initial
->Vsip::_eval_initial_loop
->Vsip::_eval_step()
-> sip_protectlib_comb_update()
-> Vsip::_eval_settle
->_Vsip::_eval_initial_loop 
-> Vsip::eval_step() 
-> sip_protectlib_combo_update 
-> Vsip::__Vdpiimwrap_sip__DOT_sip_protectlib_combo_pdate_TOP 
-> Vsip::_combo__TOP__3 
-> Vsip::_eval_settle
-> Vsip::_eval_initial_loop
-> Vsip::eval_step() 
-> sip_protectlib_comb_update()
-> ...
